title: AXNotificationButtonItem
description: Configuration interface for action buttons displayed in notifications.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Complete interface definition for notification button configuration.

props.name: color
props.description: Optional color theme for the button (primary, secondary, success, warning, danger, default).

props.name: look
props.description: Optional visual appearance style for the button (solid, outline, flat, etc.).

props.name: text
props.description: Text label to display on the button.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the button is disabled and non-interactive.

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether to show a loading spinner on the button.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Callback function called when the button is clicked. Receives an event object with the button source and handled flag.
